hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; d=$(dirname "$f"); if git -C "$d" ls-files --error-unmatch "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; then to_check=$(git -C "$d" diff --no-color --unified=0 HEAD -- "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep '^+' | grep -v '^+++'); else to_check=$(cat "$f" 2>/dev/null); fi; if [ -n "$to_check" ] && printf '%s' "$to_check" | LC_ALL=C grep -q $'\xe2\x80\x98\|\xe2\x80\x99\|\xe2\x80\x9c\|\xe2\x80\x9d'; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Curly/smart quotes introduced in %s. Replace them with straight quotes."}' "$f"; exit 1; fi
